description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden cabinet with a natural light wood finish, featuring two vertical doors on the front. The right door is distinguished by an oval mirror inset, while both doors have small, rounded yellow handles. Below the doors is a single wide drawer, also equipped with a matching handle, currently shown partially open. The cabinet stands on a flat base and has a simple, boxy silhouette with no visible legs or decorative trim. The overall design is functional and minimal, suitable for use in urban environments such as entryways, garages, or public spaces.
description: A light wood cabinet with two doors (one with an oval mirror) and a wide lower drawer, featuring simple yellow handles and a minimal, boxy design.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet, showing a plain, flat wood surface with the drawer slightly visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: The front view displays two doors (one with an oval mirror), yellow handles, and a wide lower drawer that is partially open.
description_view_2: The right side of the cabinet, similar to the left, with the edge of the open drawer and a hint of the mirror visible.
description_view_3: The back of the cabinet, showing a plain, uninterrupted wood panel with no visible features.
